question_text:
22 Generate Parentheses

Generate Parentheses

Given n pairs of parentheses, write a function to generate all combinations of well-formed parentheses.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: Use backtracking based on two rules: 1) You can only add an opening bracket if you have fewer than n open brackets. 2) You can only add a closing bracket if you have fewer closed brackets than open ones. Stop when you have n of each.
